abilities.name: Resilient
abilities.text: Attacks targeting this model reduce raises they receive by 1 (to a minimum of 0).

abilities.name: Run and Gun
abilities.text: This model's Charge action may generate (missile) actions instead of (melee) actions.

abilities.name: Unimpeded
abilities.text: This model is unaffected by severe and hazardous terrain.

actions.name: Trampling Hooves
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this action was generated by the Charge action, it deals +1 damage.

triggers.name: Rest in Peace
triggers.text: Target must have a Craven or Summon token. When resolving, this action deals +3 damage.

triggers.name: Like the Wind
triggers.text: Move this model up to 5", ignoring enemy models.

triggers.name: Draw Their Attention
triggers.text: A friendly model in this model's LoS may discard a card to declare the Interact action.

actions.name: Trusty Flask
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Another model only. The target heals 1 and gains a Focused token. For each raise this action receives, the target heals an additional +1.

triggers.name: Swap Stories
triggers.text: Once per activation. Remove a token from the target. Draw a card.

triggers.name: "That Look in His Eyes..."
triggers.text: Once per activation. Enemy models within (t)2" must pass a TN 13 Wp duel or gain a Craven token.
